title: Glencore publishes 2025 Sustainability Report
gist: Glencore published its 2025 Sustainability Report and ESG Data Book on 30 April 2026, reporting progress on safety yet two work-related fatalities in 2025, a tenfold increase in disclosure under the Global Industry Standard on Tailings Management, and positioning its commodity portfolio as supporting both global energy needs and the lower-carbon transition.

insights.claim: Glencore reported two work-related fatalities in 2025 despite a decade of safety-management improvements, and reaffirmed commitment to eliminating fatalities through its board-overseen SafeWork fatality-prevention programme.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: Ongoing fatalities are an ESG and operational-risk flag for a major miner; a metric for safety-conscious investors to track.
insights.quote: we are saddened to report that two work-related fatalities occurred in 2025. We remain steadfast in our determination to eliminating work-related fatalities

insights.claim: CEO Gary Nagle said Glencore progressed conformance against the Global Industry Standard on Tailings Management (GISTM) in 2025 and increased its GISTM disclosure tenfold.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: A tenfold rise in tailings disclosure reduces a key catastrophic-risk and ESG-transparency concern for mining investors.
insights.quote: we also progressed conformance against the Global Industry Standard on Tailings Management (GISTM) and increased our GISTM disclosure tenfold, maintaining a rigorous and transparent approach to the management of our TSFs
insights.locator: Gary Nagle, Chief Executive Officer, adds

insights.claim: Glencore published a 2025 ESG Data Book alongside its Sustainability Report on 30 April 2026, providing detailed metrics on its website.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: The detailed ESG Data Book is the source for granular sustainability metrics underpinning Glencore's ESG ratings.
insights.quote: Alongside our 2025 Sustainability Report, we have published our 2025 ESG Data Book, which provides further detailed information and metrics

insights.claim: Glencore positions its portfolio of more than 60 commodities as supporting the world's growing energy and infrastructure needs while also enabling the transition to a lower-carbon economy and securing critical-minerals supply.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: Reaffirms Glencore's dual narrative of legacy commodities plus transition-metals exposure, central to its long-term investment case.
insights.quote: The commodities in our portfolio support the world's growing energy and infrastructure needs, as well as efforts to transition to a lower-carbon economy.
insights.locator: Gary Nagle, Chief Executive Officer, adds
